name: Attempt Playback
description: Allows you to see all past attempts as ghosts

mod-enabled.name: Enable Mod
mod-enabled.description: If off, the mod is fully disabled

real-player-objects.name: Real Player Objects
real-player-objects.description:
Number of real player objects to use during playback. Basically the max number that will appear on screen at one time. 
WARNING: Increasing this number will use around 1GB of RAM for every 2k Player Objects

record-in-practice.name: Record in Practice
record-in-practice.description: If off, new attempts made in Practice are ignored

autosave-enabled.name: Autosave attempts
autosave-enabled.description: Append new attempts to disk every N minutes and on exit

autosave-minutes.name: Autosave interval (minutes)
autosave-minutes.description: How often to autosave new attempts while playing

wave-trail-ghost.name: Wave trail ghost
wave-trail-ghost.description: Draw a simple trail for ghosts when in Wave mode

allow-platformer.name: Allow recording on Platformer levels
allow-platformer.description: PROBABLY VERY BUGGY (Only works on levels with no checkpoints)
